scripts.test: sh -c 'export DATABASE_URL="${TEST_DATABASE_URL:-postgresql://jigardafda@localhost:5432/worldsignal_test?schema=public}"; export OPENAI_API_KEY=; export WEBHOOK_SIGNING_SECRET=test-secret; npm run test:setup && c8 node --import tsx --experimental-test-module-mocks --no-warnings --test --test-concurrency=1 "src/**/*.test.ts"'
scripts.test:nocov: sh -c 'export DATABASE_URL="${TEST_DATABASE_URL:-postgresql://jigardafda@localhost:5432/worldsignal_test?schema=public}"; export OPENAI_API_KEY=; export WEBHOOK_SIGNING_SECRET=test-secret; node --import tsx --experimental-test-module-mocks --no-warnings --test --test-concurrency=1 "src/**/*.test.ts"'
